questions.question: What is the main subject doing in this video?
questions.answer_key: A man is exercising or stretching near a wooden fence gate.
questions.rationale: Identifies the primary action and subject essential to understanding the clip.

questions.question: What type of location or setting is shown in the video?
questions.answer_key: An outdoor farm or ranch area with wooden fences and pasture.
questions.rationale: Setting context is fundamental for listeners to visualize the scene.

questions.question: What is the man wearing?
questions.answer_key: A green short-sleeved shirt, dark shorts, and athletic shoes.
questions.rationale: Clothing details help establish the activity and context of the scene.

questions.question: What prominent objects are visible in the foreground of the video?
questions.answer_key: Wooden logs or branches on the ground near the fence.
questions.rationale: Foreground objects provide spatial context and environmental detail.

questions.question: What type of fencing is visible in this video?
questions.answer_key: Wooden rail fences and chain-link fencing surrounding the area.
questions.rationale: Fence types establish the farm/ranch setting and spatial boundaries.
